Layout.name: Login Developer

Calculation.Text: User X Title::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code
User X Title::Localisation code ≠ FAT Title::Original localisation code

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
"This Title has not gone LIVE and is not accessible for end-users yet."
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
"This Title is currently LIVE! and is accessible for end-users."
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
"This Title has not gone LIVE and is not accessible for end-users yet."
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
"This Title is currently LIVE! and is accessible for end-users."
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
